text:
Level Up! 🍄✨ We merged 27 PRs this week and the hive is buzzing with upgrades. 

Here’s the loot drop:
🗺️ OpenClaw Agents are live (one-command web search!)
🧠 Polly API got a massive brain boost
🎬 Grok Image-to-Video + ElevenLabs Scribe v2 = creative power

It’s giving main character energy. Which feature are you trying first? Tell us below! 👇
